creator: raimo+freebsd@erix.ericsson.se
text:
Lo and behold!

With the following patch:
===================================================================
--- sys/kern/vfs_subr.c (revision 322570)
+++ sys/kern/vfs_subr.c (working copy)
@@ -2449,6 +2449,9 @@ vholdl(struct vnode *vp)
                ASSERT_VI_LOCKED(vp, "vholdl");
 #endif
        vp->v_holdcnt++;
+       if (vp->v_holdcnt == 1 && vp->v_type == VBAD)
+               panic("vhold: reclaimed vnode");
+
        if ((vp->v_iflag & VI_FREE) == 0)
                return;
        VNASSERT(vp->v_holdcnt == 1, vp, ("vholdl: wrong hold count"));


I got this panic:
===================================================================
sasquatch.otp.ericsson.se dumped core - see /var/crash/vmcore.3

Wed Aug 30 07:18:08 CEST 2017

FreeBSD sasquatch.otp.ericsson.se 10.3-RELEASE-p21 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p21 #0: Mon Aug 28 11:05:53 CEST 2017     root@sasquatch.otp.ericsson.se:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/DEBUG  amd64

panic: vhold: reclaimed vnode
